name: Points Render
description: Blend agent trails with input for particle systems

global_points_trail._role: PERSISTENT visual trail accumulation surface (rgb=deposited agent color, a from deposit). diffuse multiplies it by clamp(intensity/100) (persistence; no blur), copy blits it to the post-swap write buffer (ping-pong correction so HW blending is correct), deposit additively scatters agent colors into it (drawMode:'points', blend:true -> Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize from xyzTex dims), blend composites it with the pipeline input. Reads its own prior 'global_' output so it persists frame-to-frame (runtime double-buffers/ping-pongs; reference 04 §10.2/§10.7). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_trail') -> end-of-frame bindings persist with NO swap (trail continues from last frame).

global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([x, y, z/heading, alive]; for 2D systems xy in [0,1] with z near 0, for 3D attractors xyz roughly +/-40). Produced upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize). READ-ONLY in pointsRender: the deposit VERTEX stage Loads pos.xyz (for the 2D/3D view transform) and pos.w (alive cull, pos.w >= 0.5). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_xyz').

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([r, g, b, a] agent color from pointsEmit). READ-ONLY in pointsRender: the deposit VERTEX stage Loads col and emits it as the point color (col.rgb, col.a). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_rgba').

feedback._comment: Agent-consumer multi-pass effect with a POINTS scatter (drives a visual trail; hardest tier). State lives in PERSISTENT 'global_' surfaces. global_xyz/global_rgba (rgba32f) are agent state-surfaces created upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize) and matched by isStateSurface (suffix '_xyz'/'_rgba'); pointsRender only READS them (deposit vertex stage). global_points_trail (rgba16f, full-res) is the visual trail feedback surface: diffuse multiplies by clamp(intensity/100) (program 'diffuse', no blur), copy blits it to the post-swap write buffer (program 'copy'), deposit additively scatters agent colors into it (drawMode:'points', blend:true resolves to Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize derived from xyzTex dims), blend composites it with the input into outputTex. The deposit pass is drawn as DrawProcedural(Points, count); the vertex stage Loads agent state and emits one 1px point per alive, density-passing agent (clip from the 2D/3D view transform, no Y flip; D3D points = 1px matching reference gl_PointSize=1). No '_iteration' uniform; no repeat.
